title: hieracium subcyaneum
intro: Hieracium subcyaneum, also known as the blue hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subcyaneum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
